examples: In Elny in USA 15% of the chalcocite was oxidized in one year down to 15m depth.
Chemical kinetics and thermodynamics of copper minerals constrain that chalcocite is main and ore zoning form in sandstone copper deposits.
There are vertical zoning of mineralization, that is chalcocite in the upper, enargite at the elevation between 580 to 400m, and chalcopyrite below the 400m.
